接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/project/page/query

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/project/page/query

接口描述

分页查询企业下的项目信息列表

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"globalSearch","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%92%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%810%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"100","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81100%E6%9D%A1%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5","maxLength":"100"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
E0002 分页大小不能为空;分页起始位置不能为空; 检查分页参数是否漏传
E0002 分页起始位置最小为0; 检查分页起始值是否小于0
E0002 最大支持100条一页; 检查分页条数是否大于100
